Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class MLFilter2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MLFilter2
public class MLFilter2 extends SObject

Java class for MLFilter complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="MLFilter">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FilterName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LhFilter" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MLFilter" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LhFilterId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LhPredictionField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LhType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LhUnit" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LhValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Operation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentDefinition" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentDefinitionId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RhFilter" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MLFilter" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RhFilterId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RhPredictionField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RhType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RhUnit" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RhValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SortOrder" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
